targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  time_bucket('1 minute'::interval, pd.time AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') AS time,
  COALESCE(pm.name, CONCAT(pm.ip_address, ' ', pm.probe_id)) AS metric,
  AVG((pd.value)::float) * 1e9 AS value
FROM castdb.probe_data pd
JOIN castdb.probe_metadata pm ON pd.probe_uuid = pm.uuid
JOIN castdb.metric_type mt ON pd.metric_type_uuid = mt.uuid
WHERE $__timeFilter(pd.time)
  AND pm.vendor = 'NTP'
  AND mt.name = 'Phase Offset'
  AND (trim('${ntp_probe:csv}') = '' OR pm.uuid = ANY(string_to_array(trim('${ntp_probe:csv}'), ',')))
GROUP BY 1, 2
ORDER BY 1

SELECT
  time_bucket('1 minute'::interval, pd.time AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') AS time,
  COALESCE(pm.name, CONCAT(pm.ip_address, ' ', pm.probe_id)) AS metric,
  AVG((pd.value)::float) * 1e9 AS value
FROM castdb.probe_data pd
JOIN castdb.probe_metadata pm ON pd.probe_uuid = pm.uuid
JOIN castdb.metric_type mt ON pd.metric_type_uuid = mt.uuid
WHERE $__timeFilter(pd.time)
  AND pm.vendor = 'NTP'
  AND mt.name = 'NTP Jitter'
  AND (trim('${ntp_probe:csv}') = '' OR pm.uuid = ANY(string_to_array(trim('${ntp_probe:csv}'), ',')))
GROUP BY 1, 2
ORDER BY 1

panels.description: Remote single-packet paths use a conservative jitter estimate from delay and root dispersion when peer RMS jitter is unavailable; local chrony/ntpq snapshots may supply measured jitter.
panels.title: NTP jitter (delay/dispersion estimate or measured)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  time_bucket('1 minute'::interval, pd.time AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') AS time,
  COALESCE(pm.name, CONCAT(pm.ip_address, ' ', pm.probe_id)) AS metric,
  AVG((pd.value)::float) AS value
FROM castdb.probe_data pd
JOIN castdb.probe_metadata pm ON pd.probe_uuid = pm.uuid
JOIN castdb.metric_type mt ON pd.metric_type_uuid = mt.uuid
WHERE $__timeFilter(pd.time)
  AND pm.vendor = 'NTP'
  AND mt.name = 'NTP Stratum'
  AND (trim('${ntp_probe:csv}') = '' OR pm.uuid = ANY(string_to_array(trim('${ntp_probe:csv}'), ',')))
GROUP BY 1, 2
ORDER BY 1

SELECT
  time_bucket('1 minute'::interval, pd.time AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') AS time,
  COALESCE(pm.name, CONCAT(pm.ip_address, ' ', pm.probe_id)) AS metric,
  AVG((pd.value)::float) AS value
FROM castdb.probe_data pd
JOIN castdb.probe_metadata pm ON pd.probe_uuid = pm.uuid
JOIN castdb.metric_type mt ON pd.metric_type_uuid = mt.uuid
WHERE $__timeFilter(pd.time)
  AND pm.vendor = 'NTP'
  AND mt.name = 'NTP Sync Health'
  AND (trim('${ntp_probe:csv}') = '' OR pm.uuid = ANY(string_to_array(trim('${ntp_probe:csv}'), ',')))
GROUP BY 1, 2
ORDER BY 1

panels.description: Phase metrics use OpenSAMPL’s default reference row (UNKNOWN reference type). NTP **observation** context is the configured server in `ntp_metadata` (not GNSS unless a GNSS-backed probe is present).

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  COALESCE(pm.name, CONCAT(pm.ip_address, ' ', pm.probe_id)) AS probe,
  pm.vendor,
  COALESCE(rt.name, '') AS reference_type,
  COALESCE(nm.target_host::text, '') AS ntp_server,
  COALESCE(nm.mode::text, '') AS ntp_mode,
  COALESCE(nm.reference_id::text, '') AS ntp_ref_id,
  COALESCE(l.name, '') AS location,
  COALESCE(pm.public::text, '') AS public
FROM castdb.probe_metadata pm
LEFT JOIN castdb.ntp_metadata nm ON nm.probe_uuid = pm.uuid
LEFT JOIN castdb.locations l ON l.uuid = pm.location_uuid
LEFT JOIN LATERAL (
  SELECT pd.reference_uuid FROM castdb.probe_data pd WHERE pd.probe_uuid = pm.uuid LIMIT 1
) rp ON true
LEFT JOIN castdb.reference r ON r.uuid = rp.reference_uuid
LEFT JOIN castdb.reference_type rt ON rt.uuid = r.reference_type_uuid
WHERE pm.vendor = 'NTP'
  AND (trim('${ntp_probe:csv}') = '' OR pm.uuid = ANY(string_to_array(trim('${ntp_probe:csv}'), ',')))
ORDER BY 1;

panels.title: Probe reference & source (stored metadata)

list.definition: SELECT pm.uuid::text AS __value, COALESCE(pm.name, CONCAT(pm.ip_address, ' ', pm.probe_id)) AS __text FROM castdb.probe_metadata pm WHERE pm.vendor = 'NTP' ORDER BY 2
list.name: ntp_probe
list.query: SELECT pm.uuid::text AS __value, COALESCE(pm.name, CONCAT(pm.ip_address, ' ', pm.probe_id)) AS __text FROM castdb.probe_metadata pm WHERE pm.vendor = 'NTP' ORDER BY 2

description: NTP reference path: measurements are relative to OpenSAMPL’s configured default reference (UNKNOWN type) unless you add GNSS-backed probes; timing vs GNSS is not implied for these series.
title: NTP probes (NTP server reference path)
